task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calendar application is open, showing a calendar view (day/week/month) on the screen.

task_completion.description: Open the search bar dropdown menu
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar dropdown is expanded, revealing columns for 'Filters', 'Group By', and 'Favorites'.

task_completion.description: Configure a custom filter for the attendee Grace Patel
task_completion.visual_evidence: A custom filter configuration menu is visible with the field set to 'Attendees' (or similar), the operator set to 'contains' or '=', and the value 'Grace Patel' entered.

task_completion.description: Apply the attendee filter to the calendar view
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter chip representing the 'Grace Patel' attendee filter is visible in the top search bar.

task_completion.description: Input the name for the new saved filter
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Favorites' section -> 'Save current search', the exact text 'CFO Schedule' is typed into the input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the filter is successfully saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CFO Schedule' filter appears as a saved item under the 'Favorites' dropdown list, or is shown as an active favorite filter chip in the search bar.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface to create the filter.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser and web interface being clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use database scripts or terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are open showing SQL queries or Python scripts modifying the ir.filters table directly.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard browser chrome (address bar, tabs) is visible and interacting with the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target filter name must be exactly 'CFO Schedule'. The filter must target the attendee 'Grace Patel'. The task is performed in the Calendar application.
